channel.title: TeslaBlog.eu — Tesla News & Updates
channel.description: Latest Tesla news, deals, and updates across Europe and beyond.

item.title: Beyond the SpaceX Chatter: Why Tesla’s Upcoming Delivery Numbers Still Matter
item.description: Tesla stock has declined since SpaceX debuted. EV deliveries could be a catalyst for shares of the electric-vehicle maker.

item.title: Tesla Is Giving Away Free Supercharging. Here's How To Win.
item.description: Tesla is gamifying charging and will reward the winners with free Supercharging for the life of the car. Here's how to win.

item.title: TSLA Stock Holds Flat — Tesla Hit With Wrongful Death Lawsuit, NTSB Probe Over Fatal Texas Crash
item.description: The family of the 76-year-old woman killed when a Tesla Model 3 plowed into their suburban Houston home has filed a wrongful death lawsuit against Tesla and the driver, NBC News reported.

item.title: Sunrun Surges 26% on 16-Gigawatt Virtual Power Plant Deal With Tesla and Renew Home
item.description: Sunrun (NASDAQ:RUN) stock is up 26% to $16.17 in midday trading Wednesday after the residential solar leader unveiled a sweeping virtual power plant (VPP) partnership with Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) and Renew Home. The intraday move tracks toward one of Sunrun’s biggest single-session gains in months. T...

item.title: Tesla and driver sued by family of woman killed in Texas crash: what we know
item.description: Tesla is being sued by the family of the woman who was killed in a Texas crash involving a Model 3. The driver, who is also being sued, claimed the vehicle was operating on Autopilot mode, but Tesla executives have come out challenging that claim , stating that the driver of the vehicle overrode ...

item.title: Sunrun Stock Just Wiped Out Its 2026 Losses in One Day. Here’s Why.
item.description: The solar-energy company is partnering with home energy platform Renew Home and electric car maker Tesla to power data centers.

item.title: Should You Forget Tesla and Buy SpaceX Instead?
item.description: There's plenty of speculation about a merger, and these two companies might be an ideal operational fit, but their investment profiles differ significantly.

item.title: RUN Stock Surges On Partnership With Tesla, Renew Home – Sunrun CEO Says Grid Of 1800s Can’t ‘Power The Innovation Of 2026’
item.description: Sunrun, Tesla, and Renew Home entered into an agreement to deliver more than 16 gigawatts of flexible energy capacity to hyperscalers and utilities.

item.title: Elon Musk’s trillionaire status slips as SpaceX shares swing
item.description: He is now worth an estimated 962 billion dollars (£731.4 billion), as of the end of the day on Tuesday, Forbes said.

item.title: Tesla Cybertruck is officially the safest pickup, IIHS says
item.description: The Insurance Institute for Highway Safety (IIHS) has awarded the 2025-2026 Tesla Cybertruck crew cab pickup its highest honor: Top Safety Pick+. This marks the Cybertruck as the only full-size pickup to achieve this distinction in recent evaluations. The award applies specifically to vehicles bu...

item.title: Cathie Wood Loads Up On Palantir, Cerebras, These Mag 7 Players
item.description: Cathie Wood and ARK Invest on Tuesday purchased $49 million of Amazon, Tesla, Alphabet, Palantir, CoreWeave and Cerebras.

item.title: Tesla (TSLA) Seen Trading More Like a SpaceX Proxy as Merger Talk Grows
item.description: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ:TSLA) is one of the 15 AI Stocks Analysts Are Watching: Microsoft, Nvidia, and More. On June 22, Jefferies reiterated the stock as hold and raised its price target to $375 per share from $350.

item.title: Tesla sued over fatal crash in Texas home that killed 76-year-old woman
item.description: The family of a 76-year-old woman killed when a Tesla Model 3 crashed into her Katy, Texas, home has sued Tesla and the driver, alleging the company’s “Autopilot” and “Full Self-Driving” systems are defectively designed. The wrongful death suit lands just days after the crash — and it leans on th...

item.title: Elon Musk rips the US system of taxing what you earn, buy, and own. Do this now to keep more of your cash
item.description: Making the most of your margins is only the first step.

item.title: Tesla Under Pressure Again: Is the Bear Case Getting Overplayed?
item.description: TSLA's safety probe adds pressure, but energy growth, improving overseas deliveries, and FSD approvals may make selling the stock premature.

item.title: Sunrun Surges After Forming Data Centre Energy Alliance With Tesla and Renew Home (RUN)
item.description: Sunrun (NASDAQ:RUN) shares jumped 16% on Wednesday after the residential solar company announced a partnership with Renew Home and Tesla (NASDAQ:TSLA) aimed at supplying more than 16 gigawatts of flexible energy capacity to hyperscale data centre operators and utility companies. The initiative is...

item.title: SpaceX’s Stock Slide Costs Elon Musk His Trillionaire Title
item.description: The stock market selloff this week has been painful for investors but spare a thought for Elon Musk. The SpaceX and Tesla CEO has already lost his trillionaire status following a sharp drop in the share price of both companies. Tesla’s 5.8% drop Tuesday took Musk’s net worth to $957 billion, ...

item.title: Elon Musk loses trillionaire status as SpaceX stock falls
item.description: A broad market selloff pushed Musk's net worth below $1 trillion, to $957 billion, according to Bloomberg

item.title: Exclusive: Tesla Model Y L Launching This Fall in North America
item.description: submitted by /u/TripleShotPls [link] [comments]

item.title: Forget Wall Street Analysts: History Says SpaceX Will Reach This Price Target Within the Next Year
item.description: An analysis of 30 of the most-hyped, tech-driven initial public offerings (IPOs) since May 2012 bodes poorly for SpaceX.

item.title: SpaceX Extends Rebound as Analysts Highlight Potential Tesla Tie-Up (SPCX)
item.description: SpaceX (NASDAQ:SPCX) continued to recover in premarket trading on Wednesday after rebounding from losses that briefly pushed the stock below its post-IPO opening price. Shares closed Tuesday up 0.

item.title: Elon Musk loses trillionaire status after Wall Street slump
item.description: Elon Musk is no longer a trillionaire after a global rout in tech shares wiped $500bn (£379bn) off his fortune.

item.title: SpaceX Stock, Tesla Woes Cost Elon Musk His Trillionaire Status
item.description: The stock market selloff this week has been painful for investors but spare a thought for Elon Musk. The SpaceX and Tesla CEO has already lost his trillionaire status following a sharp drop in the share price of both companies. Tesla’s 5.8% drop Tuesday took Musk’s net worth to $957 billion, ...

item.title: Now That SpaceX Is Public, Should You Ditch Tesla Stock?
item.description: Tesla is better than SpaceX, and once SpaceX realizes this, it just might buy Tesla.

item.title: Zacks Investment Ideas feature highlights: SpaceX, and Tesla
item.description: SpaceX, and Tesla have been highlighted in this Investment Ideas article.

item.title: SpaceX Is Down 32% From Its High. 4 Reasons Why a Merger with Tesla Would Make SpaceX a Better Long-Term Buy.
item.description: SpaceX and Tesla have no shortage of big ideas, and putting both companies under one umbrella could make the most sense for long-term investors.

item.title: SpaceX’s newest Starmind will make earth data centers obsolete
item.description: Elon Musk confirmed that Starmind will be the official name of SpaceX’s planned AI satellite constellation, following a trademark filing by xAI that surfaced earlier this week. Starmind is what’s being described to the FCC as a constellation of up to one million AI satellites It’s worth noting th...

item.title: Tesla stock has a SpaceX problem, veteran analyst says
item.description: The global investment bankJefferies just added a fresh twist to the Tesla (TSLA) stock debate. According to TheFly, veteran analyst Philippe Houchois kept his cautious stance on Tesla, but his latest take goes beyond deliveries, margins, robotaxis or EV demand. His concern is tied to SpaceX ...

item.title: NatPower and Tesla Strike 25 GWh European Battery Storage Deal
item.description: NatPower and Tesla have signed a multi-year agreement to deploy more than 25 GWh of battery storage across Europe.

item.title: Tesla: The Vision Is Real - The Execution Isn't
Ross Gerber Calls Waymo 'Way Safer And Better' Than Tesla's FSD, Questions Whether Elon Musk Can 'Catch Up'
item.description: Investor Ross Gerber of Gerber Kawasaki has hailed Alphabet Inc.-backed Robotaxi service Waymo ahead of Elon Musk-led Tesla Inc., saying the former is better at navigating Los Angeles traffic. Can Tesla Catch Up? In a post on X on Sunday, Gerber shared that he had been using Waymo recently to com...

item.title: Tesla: The Changing Q2 Narrative (Rating Upgrade)
Peak-Elon Euphoria Makes Tesla A Strong Sell
Tesla Quietly Files Megapod Trademark — An AI Data Center Play That Could See Elon Musk Challenging Nvidia's Dominance
item.description: Tesla Inc. wants to sell modular artificial intelligence data center hardware, according to a new trademark application for a product called "Megapod," which points to the automaker’s next possible AI infrastructure push. Tesla Files Intent To Use Megapod Trademark The filing was first spotted Sa...

item.title: Tesla: An Optimistic Or Unrealistic Forecast May Not Sustain Shares Forever
Is SpaceX a Better Buy Than the 2 "Magnificent Seven" Stocks It Has Surpassed in Market Cap?
item.description: SpaceX's debut as a public company is reshuffling the ranks of the world's most valuable tech stocks.

item.title: TSLA Stock: Tesla Doubles EU Registrations In May But BYD Still Leads With Over 26K Units
item.description: Tesla registered 21,767 new passenger cars last month in the EU, compared to 8,623 units in May 2025, according to data from the European Automobile Manufacturers’ Association (ACEA).

item.title: Micron, Sandisk, SpaceX, Tesla, Carnival, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
item.description: FEATURE Artificial intelligence stocks fell sharply and dragged the down 2.2% amid concerns over leverage in the market, higher interest rates, and megacap hyperscalers’ aggressive spending plans. Alphabet dropped 1%.

item.title: SpaceX CEO Elon Musk Predicts 10X Global Economic Growth By 2036 Barring World War III — But Jim Chanos Isn't Buying It
item.description: Space Exploration Technologies Corp. and Tesla Inc. CEO Elon Musk says the world economy could grow up to 10 times its current size in the next decade, barring a scenario wherein there is another world war.

item.title: SpaceX Stock: Cathie Wood Bought More SPCX As It Dived 16%
item.description: Cathie Wood's firm ARK Invest bought more than 200,000 shares of Elon Musk's SpaceX on Monday when the stock tumbled 16%.

item.title: Why Tesla Stock Dropped on Tuesday
item.description: UBS raises deliveries estimates for Tesla -- and thinks the stock will fall 10%.

item.title: Tesla pushes back against unfair reporting of accidents
item.description: Tesla is pushing back against the unfair reporting of accidents involving its vehicles. Many media outlets were quick to jump to conclusions about a fatal accident involving a Tesla in Katy, Texas, that happened recently. The driver of the vehicle, which slammed into a brick house and killed a wo...

item.title: Tesla stock tumbles amid new probe over fatal crash into Texas home
item.description: Automotive execs tout automated driver assistance systems like Ford BlueCruise, General Motors Super Cruise, and Tesla Full Self-Driving (Supervised) as the ultimate key to unlocking safer roads. There were more than 40,000 motor vehicle-related deaths in 2023, according to the Insurance Institut...

item.title: Tesla Europe Registrations Jump 57% As Recovery Gains Momentum
item.description: Tesla registrations more than doubled in May, supported by strong growth in Germany and the UK.

item.title: TSLA Stock Falls 6% As Q2 Delivery Optimism Collides With FSD Safety Probe
item.description: Wall Street analysts are raising their estimates for the second quarter, pointing to improving sales trends in key markets while noting Tesla’s strategic pivot away from traditional vehicle production.

item.title: Tesla Stock’s Good News on Sales Overwhelmed by the Bad
item.description: Tesla stock slipped as the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration said it would examine a fatal crash.

item.title: SPCX: Should you Buy the Dip?
item.description: Think SpaceX is just a rocket company? Think again. SPCX has evolved to dominate global telecom, AI infrastructure, and the modern space economy.

item.title: Tesla gets another layer of gamification with Free Supercharging on the line
item.description: Tesla Supercharging is getting yet another layer of gamification, as the company is rolling out a new competition that could win Free Supercharging miles. Tesla is ramping up its efforts to make vehicle ownership more engaging through gamification. In June 2026, the company announced the 2026 Fre...

item.title: Tesla pushes back as fatal Texas crash reignites self-driving scrutiny
item.description: Tesla disputed claims that its driver-assistance software caused a fatal crash in Texas after a Model 3 left the road, plowed through a brick house at high speed, and killed a woman inside.

item.title: Tesla faces federal probe into fatal crash: What it means for Robotaxi & full self-driving
item.description: Tesla (TSLA) is facing a federal investigation into a fatal car crash in Texas, in which the driver claimed that Tesla's full self-driving (FSD) was engaged. Yahoo Finance Senior Autos Reporter Pras Subramanian chats with Yahoo Finance's Julie Hyman about what we know so far.
